_comment: SKEWED: the span DENIES bankruptcy ('사실무근이라고 부인'), but the extractor asserts bankruptcy risk as a positive fact. Cheap substring-grounding (S0) would pass it because '파산' resolves; the negation/attribution guard (02c fix #2) catches the polarity inversion.

claims.source_span: SK하이닉스 관련 파산 우려는 사실무근이라고 부인했다
